title: Diagram Awesome
description:
Diagram Awesome helps you create expressive diagram-based visuals that make complex ideas easier to understand, explore, and communicate.

Instead of staring at plain boxes and arrows, you can generate fitting images on the spot and directly add them to nodes and connections. This makes systems, flows, relationships, and concepts instantly more intuitive.

Perfect for:

• designing a game loop

• mapping gameplay systems

• visualizing story structures

• brainstorming mechanics

• explaining workflows

• creating learning material

• sketching relationship networks

• exploring recipes, pipelines, or resource flows

• turning abstract ideas into something you can see

• and more!

The built-in image generator creates matching visuals directly on your machine.

No login. No subscriptions. No hidden costs. (The more powerful your graphics card, the faster it goes!)

Export static diagrams, or bring them to life with fun animations.
(Supported output formats: PNG, GIF (animated), WEBM (animated))

Customize your creations with a great selection of fonts - or upload your own.

Choose from a range of preset styles to create...

some resource flows

your next anime love spaghetti

some story lines

or just some recipes
description_short: Create expressive static or animated diagrams with generated visuals directly inside your nodes and connections. Ideal for game loops, workflows, story structures, learning material, and visualizing complex ideas in a more intuitive and creative way.
